name: ServiceProviderPro
highlight_text: Category: Client portal software for agencies
description:
What ServiceProviderPro does

ServiceProviderPro is one of the best white label client portal tools for agencies to streamline their workflow. It has multiple functionalities to control various processes, collaborate with clients, and grow.

The platform is user-friendly and flexible enough to accommodate the needs of different types of businesses.

Source: ServiceProviderPro

Key features 

  • A centralized platform to handle various aspects of  clients management.
  • Customized dashboards that lets you set what information to track regarding your agency’s performance.
  • Client relationship management tools for managing client relationships  and keeping track of contracts, projects, and correspondence.
  • Automated responses for client inquiries during and after working hours.
  • Contact forms, links to invoices for hassle-free invoicing and payment.
  • Showcasing your products and services via order forms for purchase by clients.
  • Analytic features for team reports

Benefits of Using ServiceProviderPro

  • It helps to build a better and long lasting relationship with clients.
  • It allows your clients to easily assess the status of a project.
  • The custom features create a sense of professionalism.
  • It simplifies every process from onboarding to invoicing and making payments.
  • Through reports, you can make informed decisions regarding your clients and other aspects of your business .

Pricing 

  • Basic plan at $99/month
  • Pro plan at $249/month
  • Plus plan at $1,500/month

Pros

✅It is simple to use

✅Seamless onboarding process

✅Highly scalable 

Cons

🚫It might be too sophisticated for some individuals. 

🚫It is expensive
